scope_summary: Repair quant-lab Meta Flow adoption prerequisites after remote CR102-CR104 sync: restore state v2 and base ledgers, initialize governance policies, record package identity decision gap, classify active CR102-CR104 runtime/NAS gates as non-business-remediation blockers, and keep business code, credentials, runtime, production writes, trading, and CR-033 out of scope.
title: quant-lab meta-flow adoption process state repair and active CR normalization
